## Summary

- 

## Change Type

- [ ] Skill behavior or skill wording
- [ ] Command docs or invocation behavior
- [ ] Adapter, plugin, hook, or install path
- [ ] Evaluation, benchmark docs, or fixtures
- [ ] Release, version, or distribution metadata
- [ ] Public README, examples, or marketing copy
- [ ] Internal maintenance docs only

## Impact Check

- [ ] I checked `docs/maintenance.md` for related surfaces.
- [ ] README was updated if public behavior, install flow, commands, examples, or claims changed.
- [ ] Skills and command docs stayed aligned if invocation behavior changed.
- [ ] Adapter index and install/distribution docs stayed aligned if host support changed.
- [ ] Examples or eval fixtures were updated if behavior expectations changed.
- [ ] Version surfaces and release notes were updated if this is a release PR.
- [ ] No fake benchmarks, adoption, marketplace approval, official support, or integration claims were added.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] Other checks, if relevant:
